text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat May  3 08:47:44 2014
New Revision: 352879
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352879
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352879/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove Author line
  
  PR:		ports/189237
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/net/p5-Net-Whois-ARIN/Makefile
  head/net/p5-Net-Whois-ARIN/pkg-descr

Modified: head/net/p5-Net-Whois-ARIN/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/p5-Net-Whois-ARIN/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:47:39 2014	(r352878)
+++ head/net/p5-Net-Whois-ARIN/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:47:44 2014	(r352879)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	net perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	ARIN whois client
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 TEST_DEPENDS=	p5-Test-MockObject>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-MockObject
 
 USES=		perl5

Modified: head/net/p5-Net-Whois-ARIN/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/net/p5-Net-Whois-ARIN/pkg-descr	Sat May  3 08:47:39 2014	(r352878)
+++ head/net/p5-Net-Whois-ARIN/pkg-descr	Sat May  3 08:47:44 2014	(r352879)
@@ -3,5 +3,4 @@ takes care of connecting to an ARIN whoi
 requests, and parsing the whois output. The whois records are returned as 
 lists of Net::Whois::ARIN::* instances.
 
-Author: Todd Caine <todd.caine at gmail.com>
 WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-Whois-ARIN/
